series_metadata.series_title: Refund of Expenditure for Prior Year
series_metadata.series_description: Records that document receipts and payment where the original payment was made in error, duplicated, or made illegally within the biennium for the prior year.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for seven (7) state fiscal years or longer to ensure that the documents have been audited by Auditor of State, and then destroy. A Certificate of Disposal is required when destroying these records. ; Electronic: Retain for seven (7) state fiscal years or longer to ensure that the documents have been audited by Auditor of State, and then destroy. A Certificate of Disposal is required when destroying these records., Paper: Trash ; Electronic: Delete
